violations.details: ExportData expects processed_data as input, but ValidateData does not output processed_data; it only marks invalid records and computes quality_score. The parent has no way to provide the filtered validated records to ExportData.

composition_feedback.suggested_fix: Modify ValidateData to output the validated records (e.g., a list of records that passed validation) so that ExportData can receive them as input. Alternatively, have ExportData read processed_data and use quality_score or a validation flag to filter records.
